subject: Testing: Integration tests for prompt flow
description:
Write integration tests for complete prompt → response → continuation flow.

Dependencies: Tasks 9-13 complete (full implementation done)

Files: internal/tui/claude/integration_test.go

Test scenarios:
1. Full AskUserQuestion flow (event → display → response → continue)
2. Full plan approval flow
3. Multiple prompts in sequence
4. Prompt timeout scenario
5. Prompt cancellation scenario
6. Concurrent prompt handling (edge case)

Test infrastructure:
- Mock Claude CLI subprocess
- Inject test events
- Simulate keyboard input
- Verify outgoing responses

Deliverable:
- Integration test suite
- Test harness for subprocess mocking
- Coverage report

Acceptance:
- [ ] All major flows tested end-to-end
- [ ] Mock subprocess reliable
- [ ] Tests pass consistently
- [ ] Edge cases covered (timeout, cancel)
- [ ] Tests documented clearly
